item.name: Basilosaurus Rex
item.description:
A king among basilosaurs, and lord of the waters of the Perfumed Tides.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: This vicious creature is as a king amongst its species. Given that basilosaurs are already termed “kings amongst lizards,” this makes for confusing nomenclature, but given this specimen's particular tendency to tear into interlopers, rivals, and even minor inconveniences with its razor-sharp teeth, naturalists have elected to simply append “rex” to its title and back away slowly.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
